parameters.query: SELECT id FROM shops WHERE main_number = '{{ $json.shop_number }}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO callers (phone, name)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.phone }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.customer_name }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  name = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.customer_name }}', ''), callers.name),
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO vehicles (caller_id, year, make, model, drivable_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.caller_id }}',
  {{ $json.year || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.make }}',
  '{{ $json.model }}',
  '{{ $json.drivable_status }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO calls (
  shop_id, caller_id, retell_call_id, from_number, to_number,
  started_at, ended_at, duration_sec, intent, urgency,
  summary, transcript, transferred, sentiment, recording_url,
  human_transfer_requested, after_hours, extracted_data
) VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Get Shop ID"].json[0]?.id || $node["Get Shop ID"].json.id }}',
  '{{ $node["Upsert Caller"].json[0]?.id || $node["Upsert Caller"].json.id }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.retell_call_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.from_number }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.to_number }}',
  {{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.started_at ? "'" + $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.started_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.ended_at ? "'" + $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.ended_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.duration_sec || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.intent }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.urgency }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.issue_summary }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.transcript }}',
  {{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.transferred }},
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.sentiment }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.recording_url }}',
  {{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.human_transfer_requested }},
  {{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.after_hours }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($node["Extract Call Fields"].json) }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO appointment_requests (
  shop_id, caller_id, call_id, vehicle_id,
  requested_service, requested_day, requested_time, source
) VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.caller_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.call_id }}',
  {{ $node["Insert Vehicle"].json[0]?.id ? "'" + $node["Insert Vehicle"].json[0].id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.issue_summary }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.preferred_day }}',
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.preferred_time }}',
  'voice_intake'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO tasks (
  shop_id, caller_id, call_id,
  task_type, priority, status,
  due_at, notes
) VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.caller_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.call_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.task_type }}',
  '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.task_priority }}',
  'open',
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.task_priority }}' = 'urgent' THEN now() + interval '15 minutes'
    WHEN '{{ $node["Route by Intent"].json.task_priority }}' = 'high' THEN now() + interval '1 hour'
    ELSE now() + interval '4 hours'
  END,
  '{{ $node["Extract Call Fields"].json.issue_summary }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO messages (shop_id, caller_id, call_id, message_type, sms_body, to_number, from_number, twilio_sid)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Build SMS"].json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Build SMS"].json.caller_id }}',
  '{{ $node["Build SMS"].json.call_id }}',
  'sms_outbound',
  '{{ $node["Build SMS"].json.body }}',
  '{{ $node["Build SMS"].json.to }}',
  '{{ $env.TWILIO_SMS_FROM }}',
  '{{ $json.sid || "" }}'
);

parameters.body: =URGENT: {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.customer_name || 'Unknown caller' }} called about {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.issue_summary || 'an urgent issue' }}. Vehicle: {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.year || '' }} {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.make || '' }} {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.model || '' }}. Call back: {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.phone }}
